emails.subject: Re: Confidentiality agreement
emails.body: Re: Confidentiality agreement Brad, Please have them add a provision providing that the agreement shall be effective for a period of one year from the date of execution by Enron North America Corp. Otherwise the agreement is acceptable as written. Bradley Diebner 12/18/2000 01:33 PM
